title: webhook — field classification
description: Two entities. Signing secrets are RESTRICTED (encrypted at rest via KMS; never returned by API except once at create/rotate). Payloads are CONFIDENTIAL (may contain PII from source events). Everything else is public or internal.

audit_log: audits.webhook.* rows produced on subscription lifecycle + secret rotation + admin actions. Retained 7y cold per foundation's audit_log tier rule.

notes: WebhookSubscription.secret + secret_previous are `restricted` — AES-256 encrypted at rest via Laravel encrypted cast + AWS KMS. Never returned in API responses (hidden array + explicit exclusion in policy responses). One-time reveal on create + rotate only.

WebhookDelivery.payload is `confidential` because it may include PII from source events (invitation.sent carries email address, user.registered carries name, etc). Truncated in list views; full payload only shown on delivery detail with explicit permission.
WebhookDelivery.response_body is `confidential` because receiver may echo request payload OR include diagnostic PII. Truncated to max_response_body_bytes (default 64KB) at capture time.

WebhookDelivery.signature is `restricted` because signature material combined with knowledge of the algorithm can help attackers reason about the secret. Retained for provenance but not returned by API (hidden array).
